name: arkts-patterns
description: Production-ready ArkTS development patterns for HarmonyOS NEXT (API 12+) - state management, concurrency, navigation, networking, persistence, animations
author: arkts-patterns

skills.name: arkts-patterns
skills.description: ArkTS development patterns for HarmonyOS NEXT (API 12+) - declarative UI (@Component, @State, @Prop, @Link), state management (@Provide/@Consume, AppStorage, LocalStorage), component lifecycle (aboutToAppear, aboutToDisappear), TaskPool/Worker concurrency, Ability architecture, Navigation routing, HTTP networking, data persistence, animations and gestures.
